presentation: Sofware engineer passionate about technology and innovation, with the firm objective of facing great challenges and creating solutions that leave a mark. Motivated to work on projects that drive significant change and generate real impact.
paradigms: Object Oriented Programming (OOP), Functional Programming (FP) and Logic Programming
cujae description: For three years at CUJAE (Technological University of Havana), I studied Architecture, where I developed key skills such as structured thinking, solution-oriented design, and attention to detail. These competencies now enhance my work as a software developer, enabling me to create robust and functional solutions with a comprehensive design perspective.
matcom description: For two years at Matcom (Faculty of Mathematics and Computing at the University of Havana), I studied Data Science, gaining skills in statistical analysis, predictive modeling, and managing large datasets. This knowledge enhances my work as a software developer, enabling me to create data-driven solutions and optimize processes through logic and analysis.
onbc description: I worked for a year at ONBC (National Organization of Collective Law Firms), where I built administrative and event-management systems that centralized operations and reduced manual processing time by ~30%. I also integrated machine-learning models that automated a key classification task over thousands of records, streamlining decision-making and improving operational efficiency.
countigo description: I worked at Countigo, where I built highly complex conditional-television web applications using a microfrontend architecture (Module Federation). I split a monolith into 3+ independently deployable modules, cutting release-coordination time by ~25% and delivering scalable, modular solutions for advanced projects.
pyxel description: Currently at Pyxel Solutions, where I develop cross-platform mobile applications with Flutter. I have shipped 3+ production apps across real-time and maps-based products, owning features end to end and adapting them to users' needs.
law firm assurance description: It is a management system focused on the optimization of assurance processes and the centralization of information. It integrates a machine learning model to improve efficiency and decision making, contributing to more precise and agile management.
law firm assurance learning: I gained experience in system management, machine learning model integration, and business process optimization, enhancing my skills in data analysis and technological solution development.
medicinal plant recommendation system de: It is a data management application where users enter their symptoms and the system suggests plants that can help in their recovery. The focus is on providing personalized and accessible natural solutions for well-being.
medicinal plant recommendation system le: I developed skills in designing recommendation algorithms, processing health data and creating intuitive interfaces, improving my capabilities in artificial intelligence and application development.
suitetv description: It is a management system for a conditional television store and its products, using a microfrontend architecture. This approach allows for greater modularity and scalability, optimizing the management of products and services in a dynamic digital environment.
suitetv learning: I gained experience in microfrontend architectures, scalable system management, and modular web application development, enhancing my skills in distributed system design and frontend development.
countv description: It is a management system for conditional television channels, designed to be used by multiple entities to manage their internal channels. It facilitates control and customization of services, ensuring efficient and flexible management.
countv learning: I gained skills in managing conditional television systems, designing scalable platforms, and developing interfaces for corporate users, enhancing my abilities in content management and customized technological solutions.
faind description: FAIND is a platform for managing and operating taxi services, designed to connect users with taxi drivers efficiently and securely. It allows multiple operators to manage their fleets and services, offering a personalized and comprehensive experience over their operations.
faind learning: I gained skills in mobile application development oriented to the user, geolocation system integration, and scalable architecture design for real-time services, enhancing my experience in applying technical solutions to transportation.
my own x description: It is a GitHub repository where I implement popular software tools from scratch, aiming to understand their internal workings in depth and improve my knowledge of software development and architectures.
my own x learning: I learned about algorithm implementation, data structures, and the functioning of complex software tools, strengthening my skills in programming, system analysis, and deep software development.
software engineer skills description: It  is a GitHub repository where I compile essential concepts every software developer should know, including design patterns, data structures and algorithms (DSA), and software architecture, among others.
software engineer skills learning: I deepened my understanding of design patterns, advanced data structures, and software architecture principles, enhancing my skills in software development, problem-solving, and designing efficient systems.
programming problems solved description: It is a GitHub repository where I store all the programming problems I solve, creating a collection of solutions and techniques applied to continuously improve my problem-solving skills.
programming problems solved learning: I enhanced my skills in algorithms, data structures, and optimization techniques, gaining practical experience in solving complex problems and strengthening my ability to think logically and efficiently.
addictions description: It was a study conducted in Old Havana in June 2023, focusing on analyzing the price behavior of addictive products. The main focus was on statistical analysis of price fluctuations and their relation to socio-economic factors.
addictions learning: I gained skills in statistical analysis, economic data handling, and price trend evaluation, enhancing my ability to conduct quantitative studies and analyze patterns in real-world data.
climate change description: It is a statistical study on climate change in Cuba, covering data from 1990 to 2022. It analyzes historical patterns of temperature, precipitation, and extreme events to better understand climate trends in the region.
climate change learning: I developed skills in time series analysis, climate data visualization, and statistical modeling, enhancing my ability to interpret historical data and evaluate long-term environmental trends.
trackmont description: Trackmont is a satellite GPS tracking app that gives you total control over your vehicles and assets in real time, straight from your phone. View your entire fleet's location on an interactive map, receive instant alerts, and make decisions backed by precise data.
trackmont learning: I strengthened my skills in real-time location streaming, interactive map rendering on mobile, and building alerting systems, deepening my experience in telematics and fleet-tracking solutions.
seguipass description: SEGUIPASS is a smart access-control app for private residential communities and condominiums. From your phone you can authorize your vehicle's entry with an RFID TAG, generate QR codes for visitors and services, receive entry and exit notifications, review your access history, and report misuse of your TAG.
seguipass learning: I gained experience integrating RFID/IoT hardware with a mobile-first UX, designing real-time notification flows, and building secure access-control features, improving my skills in connected-device applications.
deltoro description: DelToro Insurance connects you with a trusted insurance agent in just a few taps. Request free quotes, get personalized assistance, and explore job opportunities, all from an intuitive platform available in English and Spanish, with instant personalized estimates for auto, health, home, or life insurance.
deltoro learning: I developed skills in building bilingual (i18n) mobile experiences, lead-capture flows, and insurance-quote features, enhancing my ability to deliver user-friendly, fintech-oriented applications.
charge2go description: Charge2Go is an on-demand electric-vehicle charging app: request a mobile charger to your location and power up your EV wherever you are, without searching for a charging station.
charge2go learning: I gained experience in geolocation-based service requests, on-demand booking flows, and mobile UX for logistics, strengthening my skills in location-aware applications.
argopos description: ArgoPos is a point-of-sale (POS) system that handles sales, checkout, and inventory management, giving businesses a fast and reliable tool to run their day-to-day operations.
argopos learning: I improved my skills in transactional flows, inventory management, and building reliable POS interfaces, enhancing my experience in business-critical applications.
mhhome description: MH Home offers a seamless, all-in-one experience for interior and exterior home upgrades. From protection to design, it covers every aspect of the home, working as an ERP-style platform to manage projects end to end.
mhhome learning: I gained experience designing ERP-style workflows, managing complex business entities, and building all-in-one management interfaces, deepening my skills in enterprise application development.
decorect description: Decorect is a business dedicated to supplying fine-quality, cutting-edge tile designs from across the globe. The platform lets customers browse the full inventory and place orders online, centralizing catalog and ordering in one place.
decorect learning: I developed skills in e-commerce catalogs, inventory visualization, and online ordering systems on the web, enhancing my experience in scalable React/Next.js applications.
ardent description: Ardent is a B2B distribution platform for hotels and restaurants. From concept to delivery, it helps them design, store, and deliver branded essentials with ease, streamlining the supply of materials for the hospitality industry.
ardent learning: I gained experience in B2B distribution workflows, inventory and order management, and building web platforms for supply-chain operations, strengthening my full-stack web skills.
ai tools: Tools: Claude Code, Codex, GitHub Copilot, OpenCode, Ollama
